findings.issue: File upload path construction without isolation or sanitization
findings.recommended_fix: Sanitize filename using os.path.basename() and store files in an isolated directory with restricted access. Avoid direct concatenation of user input to path.

findings.issue: File type validation relies solely on file extension
findings.recommended_fix: Implement magic byte verification (e.g., check PNG header) to confirm file content matches the expected type, instead of relying only on extension.
Set a retention duration (e.g., 90 days) for upload audit logs to ensure traceability and compliance.
